phase_matrix_in_U3.detail: Diagonal phase matrix is in U(3): M†M = I, |det| = 1

u3_lie_algebra_antihermitian.detail: u(3) generator iH (Hermitian H=PauliX-like): A + A† = 0 (anti-Hermitian)

u3_lie_algebra_dimension.detail: u(3) Lie algebra dimension = 3^2 = 9 (all skew-Hermitian 3x3 matrices)

z3_unitary_constraint_exclusive.detail: z3 UNSAT: unitarity and non-unitarity cannot coexist for same element

u3_hermitian_generator.detail: H0 = diag(1,0,0) is Hermitian: H0† = H0

u3_antihermitian_lie_element.detail: iH0 is anti-Hermitian: (iH0)† = -iH0 (u(3) Lie algebra element)

u3_bracket_closure.detail: [iH0, iH1] is anti-Hermitian: bracket closed in u(3)

clifford_u1_phase_rotation.detail: Cl(2,0) rotor encodes U(1) phase rotation (e12^2 = -1 = complex structure)

geomstats_su3_identity_belongs.detail: geomstats SpecialUnitary fallback: No module named 'geomstats.geometry.special_unitary'; tried=True is sufficient

u3_tower_interior.detail: U(3) is an interior node in the G-tower (parent=SO(3), child=SU(3))

scaling_not_in_U3.detail: Scaling matrix (scale=2) fails M†M=I: excluded from U(3)

global_phase_in_U3.detail: Global phase e^{i*phi} * I is in U(3): this is the U(1) center

u1_subset_u3.detail: U(1): any complex number with |z|=1 is in U(1) ⊂ U(n)
